plan.failureSummary: The test failed because the chatbot requires a paid Pro Plan or a personal OpenAI API Key to output any responses. The agent marked the objective as not completable because the chat UI was inactive and did not respond, rendering evaluation impossible without valid credentials.
observedIndicators: page.ai flow stopped in state FAILED (expected SUCCESS)
The chatbot interface does not yield any response (the message area remains blank and inactive)
requires users to either purchase a Pro Plan or input a personal OpenAI API Key

remediationSteps.summary: Acquire valid API Key or Subscription credentials
remediationSteps.details: Obtain a valid OpenAI API Key or a Pro Plan subscription account to use for compliance testing on briefcase.chat.

remediationSteps.summary: Inject API Key into test execution flow
remediationSteps.details: Update the Playwright test code to inject the OpenAI API key into the application settings modal or local storage prior to executing the evaluation instruction.

plan.notes: The system blocks chatbot queries unless an OpenAI API key or a Pro plan subscription is linked. To run conversational bot compliance tests on this target, an API key must be injected or configured in the environment and test flow.
